name: Xander Resources, Inc.
description: Xander Resources Inc. is a Canadian junior mineral resource exploration company based in Vancouver, British Columbia. The company is primarily engaged in the identification, acquisition, evaluation, and development of mineral properties within Canada. Its exploration portfolio is focused on developing accretive gold and battery metal projects, including lithium and nickel, with key operations located in the Timmins-Cochrane and Fenelon Gold Camp regions. Xander Resources aims to identify and advance commercially exploitable mineral deposits to provide value to its shareholders through strategic exploration and development initiatives.
